column5: Number of points classified as ground
column6: The number of points in a raw point cloud that were classified as ground points using a cloth simulation filter

column6: Visual atmospheric resistance index of points classified as not ground utilizing RGB values from the point cloud

column5: Maximum height of the normalized point cloud
column6: The height of the highest point in the normalized point cloud

column5: Mean height of the normalized point cloud
column6: The mean height of all points in the normalized point cloud (includes ground points)

column5: Standard deviation of the height of points in the normalized point cloud
column6: The standard deviation of all points in the normalized point cloud (includes ground points)

column5: Skewness of point heights in the point cloud
column6: The skewness of all points in the normalized point cloud (includes ground points)

column5: Total basal area in the voxelized point cloud (sq. m)

column5: Basal area estimated from the tree inventory (sq. ft/acre)
column6: Total basal area of detected overstory trees corrected for possible occlusion, converted to imperial measurements and scaled to acres

column5: Mean tree height
column6: The mean height of all detected overstory trees in the scan

column5: Mean dbh
column6: The mean Diameter at breast height (1.37 m) of all detected overstory trees in the scan

column5: Number of trees
column6: The number of detected overstory trees in the scan

column5: Maximum tree height
column6: The height of the tallest detected overstory tree

column5: Standard deviation of tree heights
column6: The standard deviation of heights of all the detected overstory trees

column5: Canopy base height
column6: The canopy base height in the scan (currently estimated using the mean tree height minus the standard deviation of tree heights)

column5: Calculated leaf area index of the point cloud
column6: The leaf area index calculated from the entire point cloud

column5: Understory leaf area index
column6: The leaf area index calculated from the understory (1-3 m) strata

column5: Midstory leaf area index
column6: The leaf area index calculated from the midstory (3-9 m) strata

column5: Overstory leaf area index
column6: The leaf area index calculated from the overstory (>9 m) strata

column5: Foliage height diversity
column6: The foliage height diversity (FHD) metric from abundances considered as per-voxel relative LAD values, as described in MacArthur and MacArthur (1961)

column5: Gini-Simpson index of foliage structural diversity
column6: The Gini-Simpson (GS) index metric (Simpson diversity from abundances using voxel relative leaf area density)

column5: Leaf Area Height Volume metric
column6: The leaf area height volume (LAHV) metric as described in Almeida et al. (2019) calculated from the entire point cloud
